value.PublicRemarks: Do you love to RUN, or WALK or CYCLE in FISH CREEK PARK?  Come see this fantastic Evergreen two-storey home BACKING WEST onto GREENSPACE, with QUICK ACCESS into FISH CREEK PARK!    Also close to parks, schools, shopping and transit!  Are you looking for a great family home?  Come see 244 Eversyde Mews!  This home is in fantastic condition.  Located in a low traffic CUL-SAC, and is move-in ready!  Lots of room for your family to grow, with over 1900 SQ.FT. above grade plus a FINISHED BASEMENT (over 2700 SQ.FT. total).   ROOMY DOUBLE ATTACHED GARAGE, 4 bedrooms and 3.5 baths!    Step in the front door and be greeted by hardwood floors running through much of the main level!  Work from home?  Enjoy closing the door to the MAIN LEVEL OFFICE at the end of each workday.   Soaring ceilings in the front entry and 9' ceilings through the balance of the main level.  Main level laundry.  Half-bathroom is nicely tucked away, and close to the mudroom for easy clean-up after a day of outdoor fun.  The kitchen and living room are very open with LARGE WINDOWS at the back for PLENTY OF NATURAL LIGHTING!   How about a kitchen with a LARGE CENTRAL ISLAND (and corner pantry), great for entertaining friends and family!  Warm CINAMMON-COLOURED MAPLE CABINETS, with a matching MAPLE PANTRY DOOR (and MATCHING BASEBOARDS AND DOOR TRIM).   STAINLESS-STEEL appliances in the kitchen, plus MANY POT LIGHTS to brighten your day!  Built-in CEILING SPEAKERS.  The EATING AREA is large enough that you can extend the table for your guests and serve up some delicious meals.  The LIVING ROOM has a GAS FIREPLACE to keep you cozy year-round.  Step out to the WEST-BACKING deck with VIEWS TO THE GREENSPACE (and a GAS LINE for your BBQ).  The back deck is large enough to host a large summer gathering.  The kids can HEAD OUT THE BACK GATE to toss a ball or down the path in either direction to school yards with ball diamonds & soccer fields.  MATURE TREES provide backyard privacy!   In the evening, head downsta irs for a movie night.  The lower level has a GUEST ROOM and FULL BATHROOM, plus a LARGE REC ROOM, with enough space for an in-home theatre and a pool table.  OR the lower level could become 'KID-ZONE', where the toys are strewn about, but the main level remains tidy all day long.  At the end of the day, head upstairs to three sizeable bedrooms.     The SPACIOUS PRIMARY BEDROOM comes with a WALK-IN CLOSET and FIVE-PIECE ENSUITE bathroom, including a LARGE TUB to soak away the stresses of the day, plus a SEPARATE WALK-IN SHOWER, and DOUBLE SINKS.   Easy access to Stoney Trail to head anywhere in the city, or to escape to the mountains for the weekend, making a desirable community even more attractive!  The benefits of proximity to Fish Creek Park cannot be overstated, for fitness and for fun. Possession is flexible.  Book your showing today. (id:65213)

Greenspace Out Back

value.PublicRemarks: ***OPEN HOUSE SAT, MAR 28 @ 12-3PM*** DETACHED 2-STOREY WITH 4 BEDROOMS UP, MAIN-FLOOR OFFICE & LEGAL 2 BEDROOM SUITE IN ROCKLAND PARK! Welcome to Rockland Park, a BILD Award-winning NW BOW River community, where this 2022-built detached home offers 2,250+ SQFT of living space. This home has plenty of upgrades including: Tankless water heater, Air Conditioning, 2 separate Furnaces, Legal Basement suite and MORE! Park in the driveway or double attached garage and enter through the front door into a bright, well-laid-out main floor. The main floor features 9’ ceilings, 8’ entry doors, and durable Luxury Vinyl Plank flooring throughout. The L-shaped kitchen is thoughtfully designed with a full-height cabinet wall for lots of storage and a central island positioned to take in views through the window wall while you cook. The perks continue with Quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, a chimney-style hood fan, upgraded cabinetry, and a walk-through pantry that connects directly to the mudroom and double attached garage. From here, the space flows into the living room, anchored by a sleek electric fireplace, and into the dining area that opens directly to the backyard and deck. Take the party outside onto the back deck and into a private yard well-suited for summer BBQs, kids at play, and dog lovers. Finishing off the main-floor is a 2pc powder room & a WFH office or spare bedroom with a window that adds valuable versatility. Upstairs, the layout continues to impress with a spacious bonus room, 4 full bedrooms, and upper-level laundry — a combination that’s sure to accommodate all of the family's changing needs over time. The primary bedroom is well-proportioned and includes a 5-piece ensuite with dual sinks, a deep soaker tub,  a separate glass shower, & a walk-in closet. Three additional bedrooms and a 4-piece main bathroom complete the upper level. The LEGAL 2 BEDROOM BASEMENT SUITE was run as a successful airbnb or can be used as a long term rental. This unit  is completely separate including its' own entrance, kitchen, laundry and bathroom. Rockland Park is a beautiful new master-planned community that is built around green space and connectivity, with nearby parks, playgrounds, and direct access to the Bow River with walking/biking pathways & spectacular views! Or you can head down the street to Rockland Park Pond & the recently opened Rockland Park Community Hub! The Lodge is a 4,750 SQFT recreation facility, exclusive to all Rockland Park residents, equipped with an outdoor pool, Pickleball courts, a skating rink, fire-pits, playground and more. Quick access to the rest of the city is available through several nearby major roadways including Stoney Trail, Nose Hill Drive, & Trans-Canada Highway. Jumping in the car: Downtown is a 23 min drive (21.3KM), Airport is a 24 min drive (26.7KM), & Banff is a 1hr 12 min drive (118KM). (id:65213)

value.PublicRemarks: An increasing number of people are being drawn to the quaint Village of Drayton. Home to the PMD Arena, agricultural fairgrounds, parks, sports fields, Mapleton Health Centre, and Drayton Festival Theatre, this community combines the allure of quiet country living with a short drive to Conestogo Lake, K-W, Elmira, Guelph, & Fergus. Make your next address 21 Union St., a spacious WALK-OUT BUNGALOW with 2nd kitchen, +1 bedroom, common space, and newer full bath with raised toilet and extra-long/deep jetted tub on the lowest level—ideal for in-law suite and multi-generational living. Primary kitchen was upgraded in 2018, and new vinyl flooring throughout the main floor was added then.  Classic cabinetry in the French-provincial style, plus a custom range hood, elegant tile backsplash, modern appliances and plentiful counters makes this kitchen a functional and enjoyable space. The dinette boasts large windows for natural light, and flows seamlessly to the kitchen. A gas fireplace insert, added approx. 2018, conveys a warm, cozy atmosphere in the family room. A dining room, separated by pocket doors, makes entertaining a joy. Plus, there is a bright 13’x10’ three-season sunroom at the back of the home! Accessibility features include extra-wide doors on 2 main bedrooms, and 3-piece ensuite bath with walk-in shower, for those with mobility issues or to age-in-place. Glass-paned pocket doors separate the dinette area from a third bedroom, ideal as a nursery, den or home office. Main floor laundry makes chores a breeze. Lower level has a large storage/workshop/utility area with second walk-out to yard. Large garage plus handy double wide parking in the driveway. Big yard is fully fenced and perfect for kids or pets. Recent updates include: furnace, AC and air exchanger (2021) serviced annually; eavestroughs and downspouts; new downstairs door; 2 raised toilets; new garage door; rebuilt driveway retaining wall. Public transit is available through a service called RIDE WELL. (id:65213)

value.PublicRemarks: A truly remarkable home that must be seen in person to be fully appreciated. This Jayman-built Maybeck design sits on a massive premium pie lot in Cranston Ridge just steps from the Bow River Valley pathways and comes wrapped in privacy, sunlight, and exceptional craftsmanship. Gently lived in by its original owner, it offers over 2331 sq ft of refined living space, situated in a quiet cul-de-sac. Inside, two-storey windows draw the outdoors in, drenching both floors with bright natural light and framing views of the extensively landscaped yard. A custom gas fireplace, rich built-ins, and genuine hardwood flooring create a warm, welcoming atmosphere that’s ideal for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. The gourmet kitchen is a true cook’s haven, complete with a 48" professional range, dual ovens, heat lamps, chef’s pantry, central island, and solid cabinetry with slide-out features and stemware rack, solidly crafted for performance and longevity. Upstairs, the private primary suite becomes your personal sanctuary with a spa-inspired 5-piece ensuite featuring a soaker tub, oversized steam shower, and custom built-ins in both the walk-in and hallway. A generous second bedroom with built-in desk, 5-piece bath, and a beautifully appointed bedroom/library with custom shelving and a queen wall bed offer flexible, high-quality spaces for guests, a home office, or quiet retreat. Outdoors, the west yard is a showpiece with winding stone flower beds, a two-tiered deck, and stamped concrete patio surrounded by mature trees and flowering shrubs. It’s a setting designed for long summer evenings, morning coffees and peaceful outdoor moments. Additional features include solid-core oak doors throughout, coffered ceilings, a multi-room sound system, stately custom window coverings, and a truck-sized garage with man door. Don’t miss this opportunity to own an executive home where quality, care, and craftsmanship shape every space, and where the lifestyle feels as excepti onal as the home itself. (id:65213)

value.PublicRemarks: This beautifully maintained, nearly new Net Zero-ready detached home in Kitchener West offers almost 2,000 sq ft of finished living space with 3 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms. Built within the last 5 years, the home provides low energy costs and thoughtful design throughout. The bright main floor features spacious living and dining areas, a modern kitchen with builder upgrades, and a convenient powder room. Nearly $40,000 in upgrades include upgraded stairs, custom light fixtures, enhanced kitchen finishes, and California shutters throughout. Upstairs offers a generous primary bedroom with an upgraded ensuite featuring a walk-in shower and two walk in closets, two additional bedrooms, a full bath, and upper-level laundry. The unfinished basement provides excellent future potential. Additional features include an attached garage, double-wide driveway, fenced yard, central air, on-demand water heater, and an ideal location close to parks, schools, shopping, transit, and highway access. (id:65213)

DIRECTLY ACROSS PLAYGROUND AND SCHOOL!! FULLY RENOVATED!! NEW WINDOWS!! DOUBLE DETACHED OVERSIZED GARAGE!! ILLEGAL SUITE BASEMENT!! SEPARATE ENTRANCE!! SEPARATE LAUNDRY!! 4 BED 2.5 BATH!! 1620+ SQFT OF LIVING SPACE!! Welcome to this beautifully updated home in the heart of Temple!  The main floor features a bright and spacious living area, a dedicated dining space with direct access to the backyard deck, a modern kitchen, and a convenient 2-piece bath. The layout flows comfortably, making it ideal for everyday living and entertaining. Upstairs, you’ll find 3 well-sized bedrooms including the primary bedroom, along with a 4-piece bath. Laundry is conveniently located on the same level. The basement offers an ILLEGAL SUITE WITH SEPARATE ENTRANCE, separate laundry, 1 bedroom, kitchen, recreation area, 3-piece bath, and additional storage space. Outside, enjoy the DOUBLE DETACHED OVERSIZED GARAGE and a backyard deck perfect for summer gatherings. Located in Temple, close to schools, parks, shopping, transit, and all major amenities. MOVE-IN READY WITH BUILT-IN FLEXIBILITY — SEE IT BEFORE IT’S GONE!! (id:65213)

value.PublicRemarks: Detached, freehold home, backing onto a pond and trails - set on a private, south-facing lot with no rear neighbours, a rare find at this price point! Offering 3 beds and 3 baths, this 1,322 square foot home stands out for its curb appeal, bright interior, updated finishes, and location. The primary bedroom includes a 3-piece ensuite, and the fully finished basement features pot lighting, a gas fireplace, and laundry - ideal for additional living space or family flexibility. Extensively improved and thoughtfully maintained, this home features significant upgrades throughout, including a refreshed kitchen with all new stainless steel appliances and direct access to backyard, a fully renovated main bathroom (2025), new carpet, baseboards, lighting, mirrors, and window coverings (2026), along with fresh paint throughout. Major system upgrades include furnace and A/C (2020), new front door (2022), water softener (2023), garage door (2025), and humidifier (2025). Backing onto a pond (scheduled for completion Spring 2026) and trail system, the backyard benefits from a south-facing exposure and a direct connection to outdoor living. Bike the trails in summer or skate in winter, all just steps from your door. Every detail has been thoughtfully addressed - offering a truly move-in ready home where the heavy lifting has already been done, in a great location. ** This is a linked property.** (id:65213)

Discover the perfect blend of sophisticated living and everyday comfort in this exceptional home in the heart of Winston Heights. Spanning over 2,900 square feet of thoughtfully developed space, this residence offers stunning views and a layout that truly works for how you live.The main floor welcomes you with an open, light-filled living room anchored by a cozy gas fireplace — the kind of space where memories are made over long dinners and great conversations. Just steps away, the gourmet kitchen shines with premium finishes and thoughtful design, making it a joy to cook, entertain, or simply enjoy your morning coffee.Upstairs, the second floor delivers flexibility with a peaceful primary suite featuring a luxurious 5-piece ensuite, plus two additional bedrooms that adapt beautifully for family, a home office, or a quiet reading nook. The third floor is a true standout — a private master retreat with its own generous 5-piece ensuite and a private patio that captures breathtaking views, ideal for unwinding with a glass of wine on warm summer evenings.Throughout the home, you’ll notice the quality touches: rich hardwood floors, sleek quartz countertops, and impeccable craftsmanship in every detail.The fully finished basement adds even more living options with a spacious recreation room complete with a wet bar, two additional bedrooms, and a full bathroom — perfect for guests, teens, or extended family.Located in vibrant Winston Heights, you’re surrounded by parks, golf courses, and just minutes from downtown Calgary — giving you the rare combination of peaceful neighbourhood living with effortless city access. (id:65213)

value.PublicRemarks: Spacious and meticulously cared-for 4-level backsplit with over 2,000 sq ft of total living space, featuring 4 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms, including 2 ensuite bedrooms—perfect for multi-generational living. Separate side entrance offers added flexibility, while the finished basement provides versatile living space. Convenient main level laundry. Major updates already completed. Prime Hamilton Mountain location just off Rymal Rd, steps to schools and amenities. (id:65213)

Ravines of Royal Oak by Janssen Homes offers unmatched quality & design, located on the most scenic & tranquil of sites in the mature NW community of Royal Oak. This 2BR, 1-full bath 1,233sf (1,233RMS) 24’-wide stacked townhouse with single attached garage boasts superior finishings. Open-concept-plan features a fresh, modern kitchen with full-height cabinets, soft close doors/drawers & full extension glides, quartz counters, undermount sink, plus 4 S/S appliances & convenient peninsula island opening onto both dining area with access to rear balcony & spacious living room. With over 900sf on the second living level there is ample space for a roomy master retreat, 4-pce bath with tile floor & quartz vanity, an additional bedroom which can be used as an office, & ultra-convenient laundry area. Convenient flex room on the main level along with a single attached garage with room to park an extra car on front driveway completes the package. Ravines of Royal Oak goes far beyond typical townhome offerings; special attention has been paid to utilizing high quality, maintenance free, materials to ensure long-term, worry-free living. Acrylic stucco with underlying 'Rainscreen' protection, stone, & Sagiwall vertical planks (ultra-premium European siding) ensure not only that the project will be one of the most beautiful in the city, but that it will stand the test of time with low maintenance costs. Other premium features include triple-pane, argon filled low-e, aluminum clad windows, premium grade cabinetry with quartz countertops throughout, 9' wall height on all levels, premium Torlys LV Plank flooring, 80-gal hot water tank, a fully insulated & drywalled attached garage that includes a hose bib & smart WiFi door opener, among other features. Condo fees include building insurance, exterior building maintenance & long-term reserve/replacement fund, road & driveway maint., landscaping maint., driveway & sidewalk snow removal, landscaping irrigation, street & pathway lighting , garbage/recycling/organics service. Bordered by ponds, natural ravine park, walking paths & only minutes to LRT station, K-9 schools, YMCA & 4 major shopping centres.  Note - photos from a similar model in the complex. (id:65213)

value.PublicRemarks: *VTB AVAILABLE* WELCOME TO LAKESHORE, YOUR PERFECT HOME! THIS EXQUISITE 2-STORY RESIDENCE COMBINES MODERN DESIGN, COMFORT, AND NATURAL BEAUTY. FEATURING 5 BEDROOMS, INCLUDING A SPACIOUS PRIMARY SUITE WITH A WALK-IN CLOSET AND LUXURIOUS ENSUITE, THIS HOUSE WAS FULLY RENOVATED IN 2022. UPDATES INCLUDE A BRIGHT KITCHEN WITH A LARGE EATING ISLAND, STUNNING GRANITE, AND SUBWAY TILE BACKSPLASH, AS WELL AS STYLISH PORCELAIN-TILED BATHROOMS. WITH NEW FLOORING, TRIMS, PAINT, WINDOWS, DOORS, PLUMBING, ELECTRICAL, AND LED POT LIGHTS THROUGHOUT, THIS HOME IS MOVE-IN READY. THE OPEN CONCEPT DESIGN CONNECTS YOUR LIVING SPACE TO A FAMILY ROOM WITH A STONE FIREPLACE AND A BACKYARD OASIS WITH AN INGROUND POOL, SUN DECK, AND LUSH GREENERY. CURB APPEAL ABOUNDS WITH A GARAGE, NEW SOD, AND A CEMENT DRIVEWAY. CUSTOM DESIGNED FOR TODAY'S SAVVY BUYERS, DON'T MISS OUT ON THIS SHOWSTOPPER. CONTACT US NOW TO MAKE THIS PLACE YOURS! (id:65213)

Welcome home to this beautifully updated carpet-free townhouse offering versatile living space and thoughtful upgrades throughout. The bright and inviting main level features a large entryway closet, a spacious living area enhanced with modern pot lights (2024), a convenient powder room, and a stylish kitchen updated in 2021 with quartz countertops, tile flooring, and a contemporary backsplash. Newer appliances, including a dishwasher and stove (2025), make this kitchen both functional and ideal for everyday living and entertaining. Upstairs, you’ll find three comfortable bedrooms and a full bathroom, a huge linen closet, providing a practical layout for families, professionals, or those needing extra space for a home office. The fully finished basement adds exceptional flexibility with a private lower-level suite featuring a bedroom, full bathroom, separate dining area and kitchenette with wet bar, along with tile flooring, ample cabinetry and pot lights (2021). This space is ideal for extended family, guests or suited for families seeking comfortable multi-generational living. Additional updates include a washer and dryer (2023), furnace replaced in (2021), owned water softener (2023), and fresh paint completed in (2026). Ideally located steps from LRT and just a 5 minute drive to Fairview Park mall, this home offers unbeatable convenience with quick access to shopping, restaurants, grocery stores, parks, greenspaces and major highways. A fantastic opportunity for first-time buyers, investors, or families seeking flexible living space - this move-in-ready home offers comfort, functionality, modern updates throughout and excellent location. (id:65213)
